title: Heaven Himachal Tour Package
subtitle: India | Travel | Holiday Dream  Explore  Discover...
duration: India | Travel | Holiday Dream  Explore  Discover
highlights: Visit places like Green Valley,Kufri,Indira tourist park, Himalayan Nature park at Chini banglow and Fagu valley.There are other places to see in Shimla palces like Chail, Naldehara,Nakanda and Tatapani. Manali is 280 k.m. from shimla journey time up to 9 hours, see on the way places like Sunder Nagar lake, Pandoh dam, Vaishno Devi Temple at Kullu. At Manali visit “HADIMBA TEMPLE” Built in 1553 with a superbly crafted four tiered pagoda roof, it is famous for its exquisitely carved doorway .
Attractions : Shimla, Kufri, Manali, Solang Valley, Dharmshala, Dalhousie, Khajjiar

subtitle: India | Travel | Holiday Dream  Explore  Discover...

highlights: Discover the captivating Dharamshala, Dalhousie, and Amritsar tour, a journey through North India's scenic beauty and rich culture. Start in Amritsar with a visit to the majestic Golden Temple and the poignant Jallianwala Bagh. Then, travel to Dalhousie, known for its stunning landscapes and the picturesque Khajjiar, often referred to as the "Mini Switzerland of India." Finally, explore Dharamshala, where you can immerse yourself in Tibetan culture and enjoy breathtaking views of the Himalayas.

title: Shimla Tour Package
subtitle: India | Travel | Holiday Dream  Explore  Discover...
duration: India | Travel | Holiday Dream  Explore  Discover
highlights: Embark on an unforgettable journey through the serene beauty of Shimla and its captivating surroundings. Day 1 begins with a fascinating exploration of Shimla's landmarks, including the prestigious Indian Institute of Advanced Studies, the tranquil Sankat Mochan Temple, and the awe-inspiring Jakhu Temple. As the evening sets in, immerse yourself in the lively ambiance of The Mall and The Ridge, renowned hubs for shopping and leisure.Day 2 offers a thrilling excursion to the charming hill stations of Kufri and Mashobra, where you'll be mesmerized by the lush landscapes and breathtaking views. Return to Shimla in the afternoon to relax and unwind amidst the tranquility of your hotel surroundings.On Day 3, bid adieu to Shimla after a leisurely morning exploring the city's bustling streets and indulging in some final shopping delights. Depart from your hotel with cherished memories in tow, as you board the comfortable AC Volvo bus for your onward or return journey to Delhi. Your journey concludes, but the enchanting experiences of Shimla and its neighboring treasures will linger in your heart forever.

title: Leh Ladakh with Pangong Lake Tour Packages
subtitle: India | Travel | Holiday Dream  Explore  Discover...
duration: India | Travel | Holiday Dream  Explore  Discover
highlights: Embark on an extraordinary adventure to the mesmerizing landscapes of Leh Ladakh, where rugged mountains meet crystal-clear lakes and ancient monasteries stand as silent witnesses to centuries of history.Explore the vibrant local markets and immerse yourself in the unique culture of this Himalayan region. Experience the tranquility of the Leh countryside amidst breathtaking mountain scenery.Explore the picturesque villages of Diskit and Hunder, and indulge in a thrilling camel safari amidst the towering sand dunes.Prepare for an unforgettable excursion to Pangong Lake, one of the highest saltwater lakes in the world. Admire the breathtaking hues of blue as you traverse through the rugged terrain of Changthang Valley.Experience the magic of Leh Ladakh with Pangong Lake, where every moment is a testament to the awe-inspiring beauty and serenity of the Himalayas.

subtitle: India | Travel | Holiday Dream  Explore  Discover...
duration: India | Travel | Holiday Dream  Explore  Discover
highlights: Embark on a spiritual odyssey with our Kedarnath Group Tour from Delhi, immersing yourself in the divine aura of one of the holiest Hindu pilgrimage sites. Witness the majestic beauty of the Himalayas as you traverse through scenic landscapes on your journey to Kedarnath. Explore the sacred temple dedicated to Lord Shiva, nestled amidst the towering peaks of the Garhwal Himalayas, and partake in soul-stirring prayers and rituals. Delve into the rich mythology and history of this revered site, where devotees seek blessings and enlightenment. Experience the serenity of the surroundings as you pay homage to the divine, creating cherished memories and spiritual connections that will last a lifetime.

title: Wonderful Spiti Valley Tour Package
subtitle: India | Travel | Holiday Dream  Explore  Discover...
duration: India | Travel | Holiday Dream  Explore  Discover
highlights: Embark on an extraordinary adventure through the picturesque landscapes of Manali, Rohtang Pass, Kaza, and beyond, where every turn offers a breathtaking sight to behold. Discover the rugged beauty of the Spiti Valley, a hidden gem nestled amidst the majestic Himalayas, and immerse yourself in an unforgettable journey of exploration and discovery.

Begin your expedition by venturing into the heart of Manali, a charming hill station renowned for its lush greenery, cascading waterfalls, and serene ambiance. From here, traverse the iconic Rohtang Pass, where snow-capped peaks and panoramic vistas await, offering a mesmerizing backdrop for your travel escapades.

highlights: Get ready for a lifetime experience of adventure as you journey through the high mountain passes of the Spiti Valley Seek the divine blessings of goddess Hadimba at her ancient cave temple in Manali Take a drive through India’s highest motorable mountain pass of Kunzum graced by the snowscapes of Himalayas Send postcards of your journey to your loved ones from the world’s highest post office of Hikkim Immerse yourself to the spiritual ambiance of the oldest Buddhist monastery in India at Tabo.

Day 2 -  Manali to Kaza via Kunzum Pass
Day 4 - Excursion to Tabo with Dhankar and Pin Valley
Day 6 - Chandratal Lake to Manali via Rohtang

title: Auli Skiing and Adventure Tour Package
subtitle: India | Travel | Holiday Dream  Explore  Discover...
duration: India | Travel | Holiday Dream  Explore  Discover
highlights: Post breakfast, transfer to Auli, one of India’s premier skiing destinations. Auli, with its breathtaking views of snow-capped peaks and vast ski slopes, is a paradise for adventure enthusiasts. Upon arrival, check into your resort or guesthouse in Auli. After a brief rest, you will be introduced to the skiing area. Begin your skiing experience with an instructor who will guide you through the basics of skiing on Auli’s pristine slopes. You will have ample time to practice your skills throughout the day, with breaks to enjoy the snow-covered landscapes and the stunning views of the Nanda Devi and other surrounding peaks. Afterward, return to your accommodation for dinner and an overnight stay in Auli.

itinerary.title: Day 3 - Skiing and Adventure Activities in Auli
Day 4 -  Auli to Joshimath and Drive to Haridwar

title: Nainital Auli Tour Package
subtitle: India | Travel | Holiday Dream  Explore  Discover...
duration: India | Travel | Holiday Dream  Explore  Discover
highlights: Embark on an unforgettable journey through the picturesque landscapes of Uttarakhand with our Delhi to Nainital, Haridwar to Nainital via Almora, Kausani to Joshimath, and excursion to Auli, culminating in Joshimath to Rishikesh. Immerse yourself in the tranquility of Nainital's emerald lakes and lush forests before venturing through the sacred city of Haridwar to the scenic beauty of Almora. Witness the majestic peaks of Kausani and indulge in the breathtaking vistas of Auli during an exhilarating excursion. Conclude your adventure with a serene journey from the spiritual hub of Joshimath to the holy city of Rishikesh, where the tranquil Ganges River awaits to rejuvenate your soul. Experience the essence of Uttarakhand's natural beauty and spiritual heritage on this unforgettable tour.

itinerary.title: Day 2 - Haridwar - Nainital to Kausani via Almora
Day 6 - Rishikesh sightseeing and departure to Delhi
